julesThoughtProcess: I chose a vibrant neon magenta (#FF00FF) because its aggressive high-contrast saturation perfectly captures the rebellious energy of the 90s cyberpunk hacker underground.
storyPanel: A phantom of the mainframe, their neural jack sparks with raw data as they breach the corporate firewalls. In the chrome reflections of the sprawl, they leave behind only a trail of corrupted magenta code.
